channel.title: Niche Datasets — Refresh Feed
channel.description: Refresh notifications for the 20 curated developer and AI dataset samples. One item per dataset, updated on each monthly/quarterly refresh.

item.title: Homebrew Packages Directory — refreshed 2026-05-13
item.description: Catalog of 12,200+ Homebrew formulae and casks with install counts, package type, dependencies, tap, and deprecation status. Full dataset $11 on Gumroad.

item.title: npm Packages Directory — refreshed 2026-05-13
item.description: Catalog of 6,000+ top JavaScript/TypeScript npm packages with weekly/monthly downloads, dependents count, npm score (popularity/quality/maintenance), and repository. Full dataset $11 on Gumroad.

item.title: VS Code Extensions Directory — refreshed 2026-05-13
item.description: Catalog of 4,800+ VS Code Marketplace extensions with install counts, version, last-updated, extension ID, and publisher. Full dataset $9 on Gumroad.

item.title: HuggingFace Models Directory — refreshed 2026-05-13
item.description: Catalog of 4,000 most-downloaded HuggingFace models with downloads, likes, license, pipeline tag, modality, and language. Full dataset $11 on Gumroad.

item.title: Open MCP Servers Directory — refreshed 2026-05-13
item.description: Catalog of 3,600+ Model Context Protocol (MCP) servers with GitHub stars, category, and capabilities. Full dataset $9 on Gumroad.

item.title: AI Tools Directory — refreshed 2026-05-13
item.description: Catalog of 2,700+ AI tools and applications with category, pricing model, and API availability. Full dataset $9 on Gumroad.

item.title: Cybersecurity Tools Directory — refreshed 2026-05-13
item.description: Catalog of 2,600+ cybersecurity tools across pentesting, defensive, forensics, and monitoring categories. Full dataset $9 on Gumroad.

item.title: HuggingFace Datasets Directory — refreshed 2026-05-13
item.description: Catalog of 2,600+ most-downloaded HuggingFace datasets with downloads, likes, license, task categories, and language. Full dataset $11 on Gumroad.

item.title: Public APIs Directory — refreshed 2026-05-13
item.description: Catalog of 2,500+ free and freemium public APIs with auth, HTTPS, and CORS flags per row, across 50+ categories. Full dataset $12 on Gumroad.

item.title: Self-Hosted Software Directory — refreshed 2026-05-13
item.description: Catalog of 2,300+ self-hostable open-source applications across communication, file transfer, smart home, and more. Full dataset $14 on Gumroad.

item.title: Design Resources Directory — refreshed 2026-05-13
item.description: Catalog of 2,100+ design resources across design systems, UI kits, icons, illustrations, stock photos, and tools. Full dataset $9 on Gumroad.

item.title: AI Agents Directory — refreshed 2026-05-13
item.description: Catalog of 2,000+ AI agent projects and frameworks — autonomous agents, multi-agent systems, agent-as-a-service tools. Full dataset $7 on Gumroad.

item.title: AI Prompts Directory — refreshed 2026-05-13
item.description: Catalog of 1,700+ AI prompts across text, structured, and image generation — categorized for developer workflows. Full dataset $9 on Gumroad.

item.title: Developer Tools Directory — refreshed 2026-05-13
item.description: Catalog of 1,500+ developer tools across CLI tools, code editors, debuggers, profilers, and productivity utilities. Full dataset $9 on Gumroad.

item.title: Open Source Alternatives Directory — refreshed 2026-05-13
item.description: Catalog of 900+ open-source alternatives to popular commercial software — each entry maps a proprietary product to OSS equivalents. Full dataset $7 on Gumroad.

item.title: AI Models & Providers Pricing Matrix — refreshed 2026-05-13
item.description: Catalog of 800+ AI model endpoints with per-token pricing (prompt + completion), context length, modality, uptime, across providers and quantizations. Full dataset $11 on Gumroad.

item.title: No-Code & Low-Code Tools Directory — refreshed 2026-05-13
item.description: Catalog of 500+ no-code and low-code tools across automation, app builders, internal tools, and integration platforms. Full dataset $7 on Gumroad.

item.title: LLMOps & Eval Tooling Directory — refreshed 2026-05-13
item.description: Catalog of 490+ LLM platform tools spanning evaluation frameworks, observability, prompt management, model serving, fine-tuning, routing/gateway, guardrails, and agent frameworks. Full dataset $11 on Gumroad.

item.title: Platform Engineering & IDP Tooling Directory — refreshed 2026-05-13
item.description: Catalog of 390+ platform engineering tools across developer portals, GitOps, service mesh, IaC, observability, container orchestration, CI/CD, secrets, policy, feature flags, service catalog, cost management, and DX. Full dataset $11 on Gumroad.

item.title: Vector DB & RAG Infrastructure Directory — refreshed 2026-05-13
item.description: Catalog of 190+ vector databases and RAG infrastructure tools — embeddings stores, retrieval engines, RAG frameworks, hybrid-search backends. Full dataset $11 on Gumroad.
